name: SABON Head Scrub 300g
pros: Gentle exfoliating granules remove buildup without harsh scrubbing
Three aromatic variants (mint, lavender, geranium) suit different preferences
Compact 300g size ideal for travel or testing before committing
cons: Price point is premium for a scalp scrub with limited differentiation
Limited availability outside major cities or duty-free shops in Japan
shortDescription: Aromatic scalp scrub with three soothing scent options.
review: SABON's head scrub offers a spa-like experience with gentle exfoliation and pleasant aromatics—good if you enjoy luxury self-care. However, at ¥5,500 for 300g, it's positioned as a premium product that doesn't dramatically outperform cheaper alternatives. Best for gift-givers or those seeking indulgence rather than serious scalp treatment.
